note: TS<->Python parity gate. 'allowed' is the canonical verdict generated from the TS InputSanitizer (threshold 0.3, detectPAP=true). Both packages' InputSanitizer must reproduce every verdict exactly; a mismatch means the two hand-maintained ports diverged. Regenerate only with a measured justification.
